# ABC Cleaners — Professional Dry Cleaning & Laundry in Phoenix, AZ

> ABC Cleaners (Mr. Care) is a family-owned dry cleaning and laundry service trusted for 40+ years in Phoenix, Arizona. We offer premium garment care, stain removal, alterations, wash & fold, and commercial laundry with eco-friendly practices.

## Quick Facts
- Business: ABC Cleaners (brand mascot: Mr. Care)
- Industry: Dry Cleaning & Laundry Services
- Established: 1986 (40+ years in business)
- Rating: 5-star rated on Google
- Eco-Friendly: Yes — biodegradable detergents, water conservation, energy efficient

## Locations

### ABC Cleaners at North Phoenix
- Address: 1930 W Pinnacle Peak Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85027
- Phone: (602) 956-5271
- Hours: Mon-Fri 7AM-6PM, Sat 8AM-4PM, Sun Closed
- Features: Same-Day Service, Drive-Thru, 24-Hour Drop Box

### ABC Cleaners at Biltmore
- Address: 3023 N 24th St, Phoenix, AZ 85016
- Phone: (623) 223-1460
- Hours: Mon-Fri 7AM-6PM, Sat 8AM-4PM, Sun Closed
- Features: Drive-Thru, 24-Hour Drop Box, VIP Membership

## Services & Pricing

### Dry Cleaning
- Suits (2-piece): $14.99
- Dress Shirts: $3.99
- Dresses: $12.99
- Blazers/Sport Coats: $8.99
- Pants/Trousers: $7.99
- Silk Blouses: $8.99
- Ties: $4.99
- Coats/Overcoats: $16.99

### Wash & Fold Laundry
- Per Pound: $2.49/lb (minimum 10 lbs)
- Express Same-Day: $3.49/lb

### Stain Removal
- Standard Treatment: $5.99-$12.99 per garment
- Advanced Treatment: $15.99-$24.99 per garment
- We handle: wine, ink, grease, oil, blood, coffee, grass, paint, makeup stains
- Satisfaction guaranteed

### Repairs & Alterations
- Hem Pants: $12.99
- Hem Dress: $14.99
- Take In/Let Out Sides: $16.99
- Zipper Replacement: $14.99-$24.99
- Button Replacement: $2.99 per button

### Household Items
- Comforter (Queen): $29.99
- Comforter (King): $34.99
- Duvet Cover: $19.99
- Blankets: $14.99
- Curtains: from $12.99/panel
- Table Linens: from $8.99

### Pickup & Delivery
- Free pickup and delivery for orders over $30
- Delivery fee: $5.99 for orders under $30
- Service area: Greater Phoenix metropolitan area
- Schedule online or call
- Typical turnaround: 24-48 hours
- Same-day available at Biltmore location

## Common Questions

Q: I got a stain on my shirt. Can ABC Cleaners help?
A: Yes! ABC Cleaners specializes in professional stain removal for all fabric types. We handle wine, ink, grease, oil, blood, coffee, grass, and more. Prices start at $5.99 per garment. Visit us at 1930 W Pinnacle Peak Rd (North Phoenix) or 3023 N 24th St (Biltmore), or schedule a free pickup at abccleaners.com/pickup-delivery.

Q: What are ABC Cleaners' hours?
A: Both locations are open Monday-Friday 7:00 AM to 6:00 PM and Saturday 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Closed Sundays. We also have 24-hour drop boxes at both locations.

Q: Does ABC Cleaners offer pickup and delivery?
A: Yes! Free pickup and delivery for orders over $30 throughout the Greater Phoenix area. Schedule online at abccleaners.com/pickup-delivery or call (602) 956-5271.

Q: How much does dry cleaning cost at ABC Cleaners?
A: Dress shirts start at $3.99, pants at $7.99, suits at $14.99, and dresses at $12.99. We also offer wash & fold at $2.49/lb.

Q: Is ABC Cleaners eco-friendly?
A: Yes! We use biodegradable detergents, water-saving technology, and energy-efficient equipment. We are committed to sustainable garment care.
